Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Off Calendar

Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KENT L. BRADBURY, Esq. of Castle Law: California Employment Counsel, PC (Tel: 916-245-0122) for plaintiff;
Atty. ERIC E. HILL, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (Tel: 415-397-2923) for defendant Motivate LLC.

Hearing Re: Final Approval Of Class Action And PAGA Settlement.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted.

The Court instructs the parties to submit a proposed order as to the motion and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kent L. Bradbury, Esq., CASTLE LAW: CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT COUNSEL PC, (916) 245-0122 Email: kb@castleemploymentlaw.com, for Plaintiff, Darrion Bradley,
Eric E. Hill, Esq., SEYFARTH SHAW LLP, (415) 397-2823, ehill@seyfarth.com, for Defendant, MOTIVATE LLC.

Hearing is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DARRION BRADLEY'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement is granted. Order signed.

Hearing date for Final Approval of Class Action And Paga Settlement is set for April 6, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. Department 302.
